# CAQH Connector - Full Documentation

# CAQH Connector Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

CAQH Connector v1.0

Release Notes:
[CAQH Connector Release Notes](../../release-notes/connector/caqh-connector-release-notes-mule-4)

The main class of an extension, is the entry point from which configurations, connection providers,
operations and sources are going to be declared.

## Configurations

---

### Default Configuration

Default configuration

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#config_connection">Connection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Address</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before the runtime considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. The runtime purges the instances when it sees fit.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Connection Types

##### Connection

This class (as its name implies) provides connection instances and the functionality to disconnect
and validate those connections. All connection related parameters (values required to create a
connection) must be declared in the connection providers. This particular example is a
PoolingConnectionProvider which declares that connections resolved by this provider will be pooled
and reused. There are other implementations like CachedConnectionProvider which lazily creates and
caches connections or simply ConnectionProvider if you want a new connection each time something
requires one.

###### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Username</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Password</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Use Persistent Connections</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>If false, each connection will be closed after the first request is completed.</p></td><td><p>true</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Max Connections</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The maximum number of outbound connections that will be kept open at the same time. By default the number of connections is unlimited.</p></td><td><p>-1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Idle Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The number of milliseconds that a connection can remain idle before it is closed. The value of this attribute is only used when persistent connections are enabled.</p></td><td><p>60000</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Stream Response</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Whether or not received responses should be streamed, meaning processing will continue as soon as all headers are parsed and the body streamed as it arrives. When enabled, the response MUST be eventually read since depending on the configured buffer size it may not fit into memory and processing will stop until space is available.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Buffer Size</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>The space in bytes for the buffer where the HTTP response will be stored.</p></td><td><p>-1</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td></td><td><p>60000</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS Configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Protocol to use for communication. Valid values are HTTP and HTTPS. Default value is HTTP. When using HTTPS the HTTP communication is going to be secured using TLS / SSL. If HTTPS was configured as protocol then the user needs to configure at least the keystore in the tls:context child element of this listener-config.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Supported Operations

- [Add Providers - DirectAssure](#addToRosterRequestDa)
- [Add Providers - ProView](#addToRosterRequestPv)
- [Delete Providers - ProView (POST)](#deleteFromProviewApi)
- [Delete Providers - DirectAssure (POST)](#deleteFromProviewApiDa)
- [Delete Providers - DirectAssure (PUT)](#deleteFromRosterRequestDaByPutRequest)
- [Delete Providers - ProView (PUT)](#deleteFromRosterRequestPv)
- [Get Provider Credentials](#getProviderCredentials)
- [Get Provider Documents](#getProviderDocument)
- [Get Provider Status - DirectAssure](#getProviderStatusDa)
- [Get Provider Status - ProView](#getProviderStatusProview)
- [Get Status - Add to Roster](#getResultOfAddRequest)
- [Get Status - Delete from Roster](#getResultOfDeleteRequest)
- [Get Status - Update to Roster](#getResultOfUpdateRequest)
- [Update Providers - DirectAssure (POST)](#updateToProviewApiDa)
- [Update Providers - DirectAssure (PUT)](#updateToRosterRequestDaByPutRequest)
- [Update Providers - ProView (POST)](#updateToRosterRequestPv)
- [Update Providers - ProView (PUT)](#updateToRosterRequestPvByPutRequest)

## Operations

### Add Providers - DirectAssure

`<caqh:add-to-roster-request-da>`

A partner organization (PO) can add one or more providers to the roster by submitting a call to the
API. For this there are different required and optional fields for the Quick Add verses the Initial
Add. Returns the batch_id that is generated on successful addition of providers on the roster.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Add To DA Bodies</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#RequestToAddRosterPVDTO">Request To Add Roster PVDTO</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>List of providers to be added to roster</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST
- CAQH:FORBIDDEN
- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Add Providers - ProView

`<caqh:add-to-roster-request-pv>`

A PO can add one or more providers to the roster by submitting a call to the API. For this there are
different required and optional fields for the Quick Add verses the Initial Add. This method returns
the batch_id that is generated on successful addition of Providers on roster.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Add Request Bodies</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#RequestToAddRosterPVDTO">Request To Add Roster PVDTO</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>List of providers to be added to Roster.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST
- CAQH:FORBIDDEN
- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Delete Providers - ProView (POST)

`<caqh:delete-from-proview-api>`

Method to delete one or more providers from the roster using POST. Returns the batch_id that is
generated on successful deletion of Providers from roster.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delete Proview Bodies</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#RequestToDeleteRosterDADTO">Request To Delete Roster DADTO</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>List of providers to be deleted from Proview.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Delete Providers - DirectAssure (POST)

`<caqh:delete-from-proview-api-da>`

Method to delete one or more providers from the roster. Returns the batch_id that is generated on
successful deletion of Providers from roster.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delete DA By Post Bodies</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#RequestToDeleteRosterDADTO">Request To Delete Roster DADTO</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>List of providers to be deleted from Proview.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST
- CAQH:FORBIDDEN
- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Delete Providers - DirectAssure (PUT)

`<caqh:delete-from-roster-request-da-by-put-request>`

Method to delete one or more providers from the roster. Returns the batch_id that is generated on
successful deletion of Providers from roster.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delete DA By Put Bodies</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#RequestToDeleteRosterDADTO">Request To Delete Roster DADTO</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>List of providers to be deleted from the roster</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST

- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Delete Providers - ProView (PUT)

`<caqh:delete-from-roster-request-pv>`

Method to delete one or more providers from the roster using PUT. Returns the batch_id that is
generated on successful deletion of Providers from roster.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Delete Request Bodies</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#RequestToDeleteRosterDADTO">Request To Delete Roster DADTO</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>List of providers to be deleted from Roster.</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Get Provider Credentials

`<caqh:get-provider-credentials>`

This method returns the xml response received by Credentialing API web service which is used by
Participating Organizations to access real-time provider data from CAQH ProView. Before requesting
the Credentialing API access, POs should have a business case and an existing application with which
to consume and use the web service. The credentialing API is designed to accept one CAQH Provider ID
at a time and disseminate information for that provider based on other parameters provided in the
API call. The Credentialing API service will return provider data only if it satisfies all of the
following criteria:

1.  Provider application status is Complete.
2.  Provider has Authorized the Participating Organization to see their information. participating
    organization roster status of the provider is active. Data will be filtered based on
    Delegated/Non-Delegated and Participating/Non-Participating relationships between the
    participating organization and the requested provider.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Caqh Provider Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>CAQH assigned provider Identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Participating Organization Identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attestation Date</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Date on which provider was last first attested.Required (Only within the past 3 years).</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Credential Section</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>(Optional) If not specified, the service will return all sections.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST
- CAQH:FORBIDDEN
- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Get Provider Documents

`<caqh:get-provider-document>`

This method returns the PDF document in response to request that allows a participating organization
to retrieve a providerâs supporting document The supporting documents will be returned only if the
following are true:

1.  The requesting userâs associated PO ID matches with the incoming PO ID, or if the incoming is
    the child of the userâs associated PO ID.
2.  The provider is on the participating organizationâs roster.
3.  The provider has given authorization to the participating organization.
4.  The providerâs CAQH ProView data profile is in a complete status, e.g. Initial Profile Complete
    or Re-attestation. If these criteria are not satisfied then the supporting document for that
    CAQH Provider ID is not be returned and the appropriate response code is be supplied.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Caqh Provider_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>CAQH assigned provider Identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Participating Organization Identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Doc_ Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Single Supporting Document Type.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Mime Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Output Encoding</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Streaming Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-stream">Repeatable In Memory Stream</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-stream">Repeatable File Store Stream</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-stream</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Binary</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST
- CAQH:FORBIDDEN
- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Get Provider Status - DirectAssure

`<caqh:get-provider-status-da>`

The DirectAssure Status Check API web service can be used by Participating Organizations to view the
status of providers in CAQH ProView. Before requesting DirectAssure Status Check API access, partner
organizations should have a business case and an existing application with which to consume and use
the web service. The DirectAssure Status Check API accepts one provider at a time.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization_ Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Participating organization identifier</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Caqh_ Provider_ Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>CAQH assigned provider identifier</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#GetProviderStatusDTO">Get Provider Status DTO</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST
- CAQH:FORBIDDEN
- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Get Provider Status - ProView

`<caqh:get-provider-status-proview>`

The ProView Status Check API web service can be used by Participating Organizations to view the
status of providers in CAQH ProView. Before requesting ProView Status Check API access, POs should
have a business case and an existing application with which to consume and use the web service. The
ProView Status Check API accepts one provider at a time. This method returns a JSON response with
the status of provider or indicate that a provider could not be found with Provider_Found_Flag equal
to N.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Organization_ Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Participating Organization Identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Caqh_ Provider_ Id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>CAQH assigned provider Identifier.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#GetProviderStatusDTO">Get Provider Status DTO</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST
- CAQH:FORBIDDEN
- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Get Status - Add to Roster

`<caqh:get-result-of-add-request>`

Method to get the status of a previous Add to Roster request, and the results if the request is
complete. If a provider is unable to be added to the roster due to an Exception, then the
Exception_Description field contains a value and the identifying fields submitted in the Add to
Roster Web Service is returned instead of the values from the system.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>System-generated unique Batch ID from ADD request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#GetAddStatusDTO">Get Add Status DTO</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- CAQH:DEAD_TOKEN
- CAQH:BAD_REQUEST
- CAQH:FORBIDDEN
- CAQH:UNAUTHORIZED
- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

### Get Status - Delete from Roster

`<caqh:get-result-of-delete-request>`

GET request to receive the status of a previous Delete from Roster request, and the results if the
request is complete. If a provider is unable to be deleted from the roster due to an exception, then
the Delete_Description field contains the exception.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Batch_id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>System-generated unique Batch ID from UPDATE request.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable</p></td><td><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#GetDeleteResultDTO">Get Delete Result DTO</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ResponseStatus">Response Status</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- CAQH:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED
- CAQH:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- CAQH:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- CAQH:REQUEST_TIMEOUT
- CAQH:GENERIC_EXCEPTION
- CAQH:BAD_GATEWAY
- CAQH:NOT_IMPLEMENTED
- CAQH:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- CAQH:EMPTY_HEAD_COUNT
- CAQH:CONFLICT
- CAQH:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE

- CAQH:NOT_FOUND
- CAQH:CONNECTIVITY

`<caqh:get-result-of-update-request>`

GET request to receive the status of a previous Update on Roster request, and the results if the
request is complete. If a provider is unable to be updated on the roster due to an exception, then
the Update_Description field contains the exception.
